title: Agri Store System
description: Developed a web-based agriculture store that allows farmers and customers to browse and purchase agricultural products such as seeds, fertilizers, and pesticides. Built using modern web technologies with product management, user-friendly navigation, and responsive design for a seamless shopping experience.

title: Homved
description: Developed a web-based e-commerce platform for Ayurvedic and natural healthcare products. The website provides an easy product browsing and purchasing experience with a user-friendly interface, secure ordering process, and responsive design. It helps customers explore and buy quality Ayurvedic products conveniently from any device.

title: HR Management System
description: Built a centralized HR management solution using Power Apps, SharePoint, Dataverse and Power Automate to streamline employee data management and approval workflows through automation.

title: AI-Integrated Task Assitant
description: Developed an AI-powered task management assistant that helps users organize, prioritize, and track daily tasks efficiently. The system uses AI to provide smart suggestions, automate routine actions, and improve productivity. Built with a user-friendly interface and responsive design to deliver a seamless user experience across devices.

title: IMRD College Chatbot
description: Developed an AI-powered chatbot for IMRD College to assist students with academic and administrative queries. The chatbot provides instant information about courses, admissions, timetables, events, and college services. Designed with a user-friendly interface to ensure quick and efficient communication for students and visitors.

title: Dev-AI Chatbot
description: Developed an AI-powered chatbot designed to provide intelligent and real-time assistance to users. The chatbot can answer questions, generate content, and support various tasks through natural language conversations. Built with a responsive and user-friendly interface to deliver an efficient and engaging user experience.
